sessions.title: Accelerate, automate, earn: Partner incentives in the agentic era
sessions.description: Your path to profit is about to become more predictable and powerful. Discover how we’re redefining “partnership” for 2026 by introducing AI-driven incentive automation across our ecosystem. This session will unveil the new, automated framework that allows you to accelerate, automate, and earn more easily in the Agentic Era . You'll leave with a clear go-to-market plan for maximizing your profitability with Google Cloud.

sessions.title: Building what's next: AI platforms, agents, and the customer experience
sessions.description: As the conversation shifts from what AI can do to how enterprises build with it, the focus turns to intelligent, agent-driven applications. Join Google Cloud leaders to explore how our models and agentic platforms work together to equip organizations with the tools to deliver more proactive, personalized customer experiences and streamline internal processes, driving measurable business impact and stronger outcomes for your customers.

sessions.title: Driving real impact: The enterprise-wide approach to AI
sessions.description: Driving real impact with AI isn’t always straightforward, so how are organizations ensuring their strategies deliver tangible value? Matt Renner, President and Chief Revenue Officer for Google Cloud, will host a select group of leaders for a candid conversation on how leading organizations are scaling innovation, with a focus on the practical strategies and real-world stories behind their success.

sessions.title: Fireside chat with Thomas Kurian
From demo to deal: Accelerating public sector partner sales with agentic AI
sessions.description: Ready to lead the next wave of Public Sector innovation? Join Karen Dahut, CEO of Public Sector, as she reveals the massive Agentic AI opportunity awaiting our partners. This high-impact session will deliver the strategies and go-to-market plans you need to accelerate partner sales and pivot from proof-of-concept to profitable deals at scale. Gain the vision, tools, and sales roadmap needed to win the US Public Sector together!

sessions.title: Google AI at Google
sessions.description: Before our AI tools reach our customers, we pilot and refine them across every workflow inside Google. Get an inside look at how we are operationalizing AI to run our global businesses – optimizing everything from our massive Supply Chain to Customer Service, Finance, and Marketing. This panel will highlight the internal strategies driving adoption at Google’s scale, offering a “Google on Google” framework for driving efficiency and innovation within your own organization.

sessions.title: Google Cloud Marketplace: Accelerating the AI agent economy
sessions.description: Unlock the trillion-dollar AI agent economy with Google Cloud Marketplace. This session dives into the latest platform and go-to-market (GTM) initiatives to help you drive sales of your offerings on Cloud Marketplace. Discover how to reach more Gemini Enterprise customers, extend your professional services and service-as-software offerings, and master scaling through the channel. You will also learn go-to-market strategies from a panel of your peers across different stages of their partnership journeys. Walk away with tools to accelerate your growth in the agentic era.

sessions.title: Google Cloud Partner Network — From framework to growth
sessions.description: The new program has launched - is your business ready to capitalize on it? This session moves beyond the framework to provide the strategic blueprint you need to stand out and win with Google Cloud. We will explore the practical mechanics of the new value-based tiers and competencies. You’ll learn best practices for using these tools to signal your expertise and build a deeper brand. Walk away with a tactical 2026 roadmap and the keys to leveraging the new AI-powered automation that reduces overhead and accelerates your speed to market. Don’t just adapt to the new era; lead it by showcasing your deep capabilities.

sessions.title: Interactive breakout: Software development in the age of AI agents
sessions.description: Reimagine your development strategy with an agent-first approach. Leverage tools like Google Antigravity in a high-level strategic session – no coding skills required.

sessions.title: Japan GTM: Unlocking the scaled opportunity together
sessions.description: Join Yumi Ueno, Japan Partner Business Lead, for an in-depth recap of our strategic journey and key wins since Partner Summit 2025. This session spotlights a game-changing initiative designed to tackle the "scaled" business segment. You will discover how to align with Google Cloud’s latest Japan strategy and dissect a pilot success story to see exactly how partners and Google Cloud are collaborating to win this untapped market and drive sustainable growth.

sessions.title: Leading the AI era in LATAM: The full-stack advantage
sessions.description: A paradigm shift is underway in Latin America: AI is moving beyond experimentation to a new era of autonomous Agents and business redefinition. This reset changes the rules of the market, requiring a new approach to infrastructure and innovation. In this session, we'll demonstrate how our zero-dependency full stack—from custom compute and proprietary data centers to global distribution and world-class models—provides a structural advantage that competitors cannot replicate. Discover how our vertical integration empowers partners to deliver faster, more reliable, and higher-margin solutions to customers ready to reshape their businesses.

sessions.title: Masterclass: Supercharging productivity with AI agents
sessions.description: Experience the next era of work in this interactive masterclass. Engage directly with the technology to learn how to automate complex workflows, save time, and accelerate innovation with custom AI agents.

sessions.title: Maximize value capture with Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: The path to realizing the full potential of Gemini Enterprise is clearer than you think. This session will outline best practices for driving adoption and effective change management across your organization. Learn how to transform your business processes to quickly capture value and accelerate your customers' success with Gemini Enterprise.

sessions.title: Navigating agentic cyber defense
sessions.description: In 2026, AI agents are serving as autonomous extensions of security teams – detecting, preventing, and enabling responses to attacks in minutes, not weeks. Google security leaders will share their insights, learnings, and recommendations for  navigating this evolution. We’ll explore the shift to sophisticated agents operating at enterprise scale, and we’ll offer up a principled approach to staying ahead of adversaries in a world of pervasive, autonomous AI.

sessions.title: Perfect harmony: Being a creator at the intersection of music and tech
sessions.description: Multi-Grammy winner and musical visionary Jacob Collier explores the intersection of art and science. Jacob will demonstrate how technology fuels his improvisation and expands the creative process, redefining the boundaries of artistic expression.

sessions.title: Roundtable: Building organizational AI fluency
sessions.description: Join Google’s Value Creation team and a group of your peers for a collaborative discussion on building a strategy to scale AI by evolving your approach to talent, culture, and process.

sessions.title: Scale joint AI success and revenue generation in North America
sessions.description: The next phase of enterprise excellence starts here. Join North America's leadership to uncover the 2026 strategic priorities for Agentic AI, moving from conceptual innovation to real-world revenue generation and impactful value creation. Learn how to leverage emerging trends to capture new market opportunities, accelerate growth, and deliver exceptional outcomes in this transformative era. This session provides a unique platform for partners to engage with Google Cloud executives and gain the specific, actionable insights needed to align their business strategies with Google's vision for the next phase of enterprise excellence.

sessions.title: The future of AI and sports
sessions.description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly driving new innovations across the sports landscape, enhancing athlete preparation, competitive strategy, and fan engagement. Hear from Olympic snowboarding gold medalist Shaun White and two-time major golf champion Bryson DeChambeau as they explore how AI and advanced analytics are redefining peak performance and transforming the face of modern competition.

sessions.title: The Future of business applications, powered by agentic AI
sessions.description: Agentic AI is transforming business applications from the inside out. In this session, you'll hear from powerhouse peers—leading ISVs and solution providers—on how this technology is changing how business applications are built, used, and monetized in a secure, compliant, and well-governed model. You will also learn how leading enterprises are leveraging Gemini Enterprise in combination with partner solutions to deliver complete, production-ready agentic solutions.

sessions.title: The future of foundational intelligence: Insights from Google Research and DeepMind
sessions.description: Bridging the gap between research breakthroughs and enterprise adoption is critical for defining future strategy. Leaders from Google DeepMind and Google Research will offer a grounded look at “what’s next” and the tangible horizon of foundational intelligence, providing an exclusive perspective on the next generation of model capabilities and the practical innovations that leaders need to prepare for now.

sessions.title: The Google way: Scaling delivery with AI-powered delivery navigator
sessions.description: The Google way of delivery is now in your hands, powered by AI. In this session, we'll explore the newest evolution of Delivery Navigator, an integrated delivery ecosystem now available to customers, featuring AI-powered search and agentic delivery methods. You'll learn how the unified framework drives project success and allows you to leverage Google’s collective delivery intelligence through an AI Agent. You'll get insights directly from partners and learn real-world strategies to achieve consistent success at scale with AI-powered delivery.

sessions.title: The physics of AI: Infrastructure for the next era of innovation
sessions.description: As we innovate at a rapid speed, we find ourselves at the intersection of advanced computer architecture and data center engineering – the new “physics” of the AI era. Join Amin Vahdat to explore the TPU-core vision behind Google’s AI Hypercomputer, alongside Peng Zhao, who will discuss the technology's transformative impact on Citadel Securities and the future of scalable AI.

sessions.title: Winning together: Seize the agentic AI opportunity in APAC
sessions.description: Join our APAC leadership team and external industry thought leaders as they unpack the region’s strategic shift toward Agentic AI — and its implications for your go-to-market strategy. In this session, we'll outline the 2026 priorities and key market trends to capitalize on the next wave of AI adoption. You will leave with practical strategies for helping customers pivot from 'possibility' to 'production' and accelerate your success in the APAC market.

sessions.title: Winning with AI: Scale joint success and pipeline growth in EMEA
sessions.description: The era of AI experimentation is over; the era of value realization is here. Join Google Cloud EMEA leadership and top partners for strategic market updates on specific growth vectors for 2026. This is a must-attend session to dissect the strategies top partners are using to convert the AI opportunity into a tangible pipeline and revenue.
